TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Marie-Louise Coleiro Preca = Mntucing hngkawas 1958 idas 12 jiyax 7 ka Marie-Louise Coleiro Preca ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Malta ta sayang o kiya ka Marie-Louise Coleiro Preca, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 4 jiyax 4 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Marie Louise Coleiro Preca (Kari Ingkoku: Marie Louise Coleiro Preca, kngkawas 1958 idas 12 diyax 7Ôľć), Malta seyji cya, kngkawas 2014 cida wada mbiyax mangal soto Malta. Hiya u mntumal Malta Kong Tang, kngkawas 1998 prading wewan Malta Congyiweyn giying, kngkawas 2013 idas 3 diyax 11 dhiq kngkawas 2014 idas 3 diyax 29 ngalan Tnsapah Mi Syakay Twancyey Bu Bucyo. Kngkawas 2014 idas 3 diyax 1 cida wada smruwa phyuwan hangan mphosweyjn soto, idas 4 diyax 1 mniq gikay ka kcka tniyax seyngkyo cida wada wewan burah soto, idas 4 diyax 4 wada psdhuwan phiyu qmpah soto. Marie Louise Coleiro Preca ka mbbiyax balay kngkawas Malta Soto, 58 kngkawas ka saya, kiya ka qnlhangan dha ps babaw kndadax Agatha Barbara daw tu2 soto qrindin.
S.PHON: = ma…ĺi…ô-louis…ô ¶ol…ôi…ĺo p…ĺ…ô ¶a = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas ** …üijax * ka ma…ĺi…ô-louis…ô ¶ol…ôi…ĺo p…ĺ…ô ¶a ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan malta ta sajaŇč o kija ka ma…ĺi…ô-louis…ô ¶ol…ôi…ĺo p…ĺ…ô ¶a, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. ma…ĺi…ô louis…ô ¶ol…ôi…ĺo p…ĺ…ô ¶a (ka…ĺi iŇčkoku: ma…ĺi…ô louis…ô ¶ol…ôi…ĺo p…ĺ…ô ¶a, kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax **), malta s…ô…üi ¶ja, kŇčkawas **** ¶ida wada mbijax maŇčal soto malta. ńßija u mntumal malta koŇč taŇč, kŇčkawas **** p…ĺadiŇč w…ôwan malta ¶oŇčjiw…ôn gijiŇč, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** dńßiq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** Ňčalan tnsapańß mi sjakaj twan ¶j…ô bu bu ¶jo. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * ¶ida wada sm…ĺuwa pńßjuwan ńßaŇčan mpńßosw…ô…ün soto, idas * dijax * mniq gikaj ka k ¶ka tnijax s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida wada w…ôwan bu…ĺańß soto, idas * dijax * wada psdńßuwan pńßiju qmpańß soto. ma…ĺi…ô louis…ô ¶ol…ôi…ĺo p…ĺ…ô ¶a ka mbbijax balaj kŇčkawas malta soto, ** kŇčkawas ka saja, kija ka qnlńßaŇčan dńßa ps babaw kndadax agatńßa ba…ĺba…ĺa daw tu* soto q…ĺindin.
S.FORM: = Marie-Louise Coleiro Preca = Mntucing hngkawas 1958 idas 12 jiyax 7 ka Marie-Louise Coleiro Preca ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Malta ta sayang o kiya ka Marie-Louise Coleiro Preca, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 4 jiyax 4 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Marie Louise Coleiro Preca (Kari Ingkoku: Marie Louise Coleiro Preca, kngkawas 1958 idas 12 diyax 7Ôľć), Malta seyji cya, kngkawas 2014 cida wada mbiyax mangal soto Malta. Hiya u mntumal Malta Kong Tang, kngkawas 1998 prading wewan Malta Congyiweyn giying, kngkawas 2013 idas 3 diyax 11 dhiq kngkawas 2014 idas 3 diyax 29 ngalan Tnsapah Mi Syakay Twancyey Bu Bucyo. Kngkawas 2014 idas 3 diyax 1 cida wada smruwa phyuwan hangan mphosweyjn soto, idas 4 diyax 1 mniq gikay ka kcka tniyax seyngkyo cida wada wewan burah soto, idas 4 diyax 4 wada psdhuwan phiyu qmpah soto. Marie Louise Coleiro Preca ka mbbiyax balay kngkawas Malta Soto, 58 kngkawas ka saya, kiya ka qnlhangan dha ps babaw kndadax Agatha Barbara daw tu2 soto qrindin.
